name: Potato Butter Horn Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Add sugar, salt, and shortening to freshly prepared hot mashed potatoes.
2. Cool, then add eggs.
3. Soften yeast in milk and combine with the potato mixture.
4. Gradually add flour, beating well after each addition.
5. Turn dough onto a lightly floured board. Knead until smooth and elastic (the dough should be as soft as possible to handle).
6. Cover with a damp cloth and place in a warm area to double in size.
7. Turn dough onto a lightly floured board. Roll into a round sheet about 1/2 inch thick.
8. Cut the rolled dough into sections, each about 3 inches wide at the outer edge.
9. Begin rolling each section from the outside toward the center, forming them into crescents.
10. Place on an oiled baking sheet. Cover with a warm, damp cloth.
11. Allow to rise until tripled in size.
12. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for about 12 minutes.
32 rolls.
Mrs. Jessie Kelsey, Lakeland, FL.
